blocks.text: Match preview: Bulgaria Women face Serbia Women in 4th T20I (T20) on Sun, 28 Jun, 2026, 11:30 am at National Sports Academy Sofia. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Mainly clear · High 30°C / Low 18°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 14 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
